ResearchProjectDef.label: Works of Nature
ResearchProjectDef.description: Welcome to the era of slash-and-burn.\n\nUnlock the most basic technologies, such as tea making, cooking, etc.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Food recipe
ResearchProjectDef.description: Food is the Paramount necessity of the people.\n\nUnlock a series of basic traditional recipes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Weaving
ResearchProjectDef.description: Sericulture, weaving, these brocade silk decorated people's lives, also brought wealth.\n\nUnlock textile technology, make silk, etc.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Cloth tailoring
ResearchProjectDef.description: Weave and cut clothes.\n\nunlock a series of basic traditional costumes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Dynasty cloth
ResearchProjectDef.description: People can distinguish high from low at a glance by how they dress.\n\nUnlock dynasty style clothing and related technology.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Crafting
ResearchProjectDef.description:
"A hundred works are the works of saints."

Hundred works refers to a series of technical artisans including carpentry, painter, stone, and metalworking. The wise man created the instrument, the scholar wrote it down, the craftsman restored it, and this can be called "craft."

Unlock a series of manual facilities, as well as the crafts associated with them, you need to study and complete the "rock cutting" first.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Planting
ResearchProjectDef.description: Learn farming skills from the ancient ancestors to unlock various crops.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Brewing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Take inspiration from the natural fermentation of food and learn to make wine yeast and fermentation broth to make wine.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Magical plants
ResearchProjectDef.description: Exotic plants brought by the cultivators, and the cultivation of these crops may have been of great help to the colony.\n\nNeed to study and complete the "tree planting" first.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Steel forging
ResearchProjectDef.description: Refined into steel, unlock better forging technology. Steel can be made into high-quality iron, and metal crafts can also be made. \n\nNeed to study the completion of the "Smithing".

ResearchProjectDef.label: Gourmet cooking
ResearchProjectDef.description: With the improvement of forged steel technology, the frying pan has entered thousands of households and promoted the development of cooking technology.\n\nUnlocks delicacies and festive foods with more complex crafting techniques.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Electrical Technology
ResearchProjectDef.description: With the advent of the electrical age, electricity and steam engines became one of the most important industries. Unlock a range of power generation and electrical facilities.\n\nNeed to complete the study of "Electricity" first.
